reference: Please don't worry, as this can be due to a local infection and antibiotic treatment can be helpful. Additionally, it can be due to venous congestion, so take some antibiotics and see if the lump decreases or remains the same.
text: Please don't worry, as this can be due to a local infection, and antibiotic treatment can be helpful. Additionally, it can be due to venous congestion, so take some antibiotics and see if the lump decreases or remains.
